svg.title: SaveWave MVC architecture diagram
svg.desc: Custom PHP MVC framework showing HTTP request flow through Router, Middleware Pipeline, Controller, Service/Model layers, MySQL database, DI Container, and View/Response output

g.text: custom PHP framework — built from scratch

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What HTTP methods does SaveWave support?')
sendPrompt('How does the SaveWave router match URLs to controllers?')
sendPrompt('How does SaveWave handle authentication middleware?')
sendPrompt('How does the CSRF middleware work in SaveWave?')
sendPrompt('What does the logging middleware record in SaveWave?')
sendPrompt('How does the SaveWave controller layer work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Service and Model layer handle business logic in SaveWave?')
sendPrompt('What does the SaveWave database schema look like?')
sendPrompt('How does SaveWave render HTML views and JSON responses?')
sendPrompt('How does dependency injection work in the SaveWave framework?')
sendPrompt('How does the SaveWave service container resolve dependencies?')
sendPrompt('How does autowiring work in SaveWave?')
sendPrompt('How does the Tesseract OCR integration work in SaveWave?')
